name: PYTHON
purpose: Provide a consistent Python runtime for other tools.
usage: PYTHON --py-list: List all installed and available Python versions.
PYTHON --py-install <version>: Download and install a specific Python version (e.g., 3.11.14).
PYTHON --py-update: Update the list of available versions from GitHub.
PYTHON --py-update --version <version>: Force refresh/re-download specific version metadata.
PYTHON @3.x [args]: Run a specific major/minor version shortcut.
